config.script:
# Open the controls side panel to display the controls for the economizer.
	
	system.perspective.openDock('controlSidePanel',params={'controlViewPath':'Building Automation Demo/Page/Controls/Framework/AHU 1/Sm/Control Panels/Economizer Controls','compNumb':''})

# Open the controls side panel to display the controls for the supply fan.
	
	system.perspective.openDock('controlSidePanel',params={'controlViewPath':'Building Automation Demo/Page/Controls/Framework/AHU 1/Sm/Control Panels/Supply Fan Controls','compNumb':''})

# Open the controls side panel to display the controls for the exhaust fan.
	
	system.perspective.openDock('controlSidePanel',params={'controlViewPath':'Building Automation Demo/Page/Controls/Framework/AHU 1/Sm/Control Panels/Exhaust Fan Controls','compNumb':''})
